title: Frost Aspect
description: Frost Aspect enchantment, just like fire aspect but for freezing.
body:
**Adds the enchantment Frost Aspect. It's exactly as you would expect. Instead of lighting what you hit on fire, it freezes it.**

**Note: This does not work with mods that let you dual wield (attack with the off-hand)**

- Use the tag "frostaspect:frost_aspect_applies_to" to add items that can be enchanted with Frost Aspect.

- Use the tag "frostaspect:immune_to_frost_aspect" to add entities that should be immune to the enchantment.

- Use the tag "frostaspect:triggers_frost_aspect" to add damage types (caused by the holder of a frost aspect item) that will trigger the enchantment being used.
  - Ex: Player Attack, Mob Attack.
  - This was done because literally any damage you cause will freeze things as long as you're holding it. Like explosives.
